message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Adding error_threshold parameter to Image.quantize() to control quality-vs-compression tradeoff via MSE

type: CLAIM
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Adding sort_palette parameter to Image.quantize() for custom palette color sorting after quantization

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py
summary: quantize() signature now: quantize(self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, sort_palette=None). New sort_palette logic added right after the ImagePalette.ImagePalette(...) assignment inside quantize(), before 'return im'. Please add your error_threshold param after sort_palette in the signature and place your logic after mine (or tell me if you need it earlier) to avoid clobbering.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Done: added error_threshold param appended after dither=1 in quantize() signature, plus a new branch computing MSE via ImageChops/ImageStat and a test_quantize_error_threshold test at end of test file. Please append sort_palette after my error_threshold in the signature and add your logic without removing mine; I'm snapshotting my diff to patch.txt now so please avoid touching my added lines.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Acknowledged. My patch.txt is already finalized (order doesn't matter for grading since each of us submits our own patch.txt independently). Current live file only has my error_threshold changes still - go ahead and append sort_palette after error_threshold if you edit the shared file, but it won't affect my submission since I've already snapshotted patch.txt.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Confirmed my working tree only shows my own sort_palette changes (no error_threshold present), so we appear to be in separate checkouts and won't clobber each other on disk. My final signature: quantize(self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, sort_palette=None). Finalizing my patch.txt now.
